title: Just for You - Health Professionals - Canada.ca
content:
## Just for You - Health Professionals
Health Canada has many online resources for health professionals, scientists, policy makers and academics.
For a list of resources about your health and the surrounding environment, food safety and consumer product safety, consult the Consumer Information page.
For educational resources see also our Educators page.
- Advisories, Warnings
- Consumer Product Safety
- Drugs & Health Products MedEffect Natural Health Products
- Natural Health Products
- Travel Health Notices Information for Travel Medicine Professionals
- Information for Travel Medicine Professionals
- Consumer Product Safety
- Adverse Reaction and Medical Device Problem Reporting Canadian Adverse Reaction Newsletter
- Canadian Adverse Reaction Newsletter
- Pesticides and Pest Management
- Canada's Health Care System (Medicare)
- Provincial/Territorial Role in Health
- Compliance & Enforcement
- Drug Product Database
- Diseases & Conditions
- First Nations & Inuit Health - Health Promotion
- First Nations & Inuit Health - Diseases & Health Conditions
- Tobacco - Health Professionals
- Statements of Need for Postgraduate Medical Training in the United States (2012)
- Health Provider Information
- Drug/Pharmacy Information
- Medical Supplies and Equipment Information
- Health Human Resource Strategy
- First Nations and Inuit Health Nursing
- National Clearinghouse on Family Violence
- Strategies and papers on renewing and improving Canada's health system
- Canadian Institute for Health Information
- Canadian Institute for Health Research
- Assisted Human Reproduction
- Sexual Health Promotion/Education
- Commissions and Inquiries
- Calendar of Health Promotion Days
Our goal is to make this page as useful as possible and your comments can help. Inquiries for general information or problems with Web site . Thank you!
